summary: Form Simplification Test (Quick Mode) - All tests PASSED. Supplier Quick Mode (3 fields) and Customer Quick Mode (2 fields) working correctly. Quick Purchase regression test passed.

minor.issue: City field update not persisted (existing behavior, not related to form simplification)

issues: 'Daftar Supplier' and 'Pelanggan' submenu items link to DataSheet view (/master/suppliers, /master/customers) which does NOT have Quick Mode. The Quick Mode forms are at /supplier and /pelanggan routes respectively.

action_items: CONSIDER: Update Master Data menu to link to Quick Mode pages (/supplier, /pelanggan) instead of DataSheet pages for easier access to simplified forms
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Suppliers.jsx Quick Mode implementation correct - 3 essential fields (code, name, phone)
✅ Customers.jsx Quick Mode implementation correct - 2 essential fields (name, phone)
✅ Quick/Lengkap toggle works - advanced fields hidden in Quick Mode, shown in Lengkap Mode
✅ 'Mode Cepat' hint text displayed with field count
✅ 'Simpan Cepat' vs 'Simpan' button label changes based on mode
✅ Edit mode automatically switches to Full Mode (Lengkap)
✅ New entry mode defaults to Quick Mode
✅ All data-testid attributes present for testing
✅ Backend APIs accept minimal fields for Quick Mode
seed_data_creation: Created test suppliers (SUP-QM-*, SUP-DEF-*, SUP-FULL-*) and customers via API for backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Form Simplification (Quick Mode) fully tested. Quick Mode forms are at /supplier and /pelanggan routes. DataSheet views at /master/suppliers and /master/customers use standard full forms without Quick Mode feature.

supplier_quick_mode_3_fields.evidence: Quick Mode shows only code, name, phone fields. Advanced fields (contact, bank, notes) hidden.

supplier_full_mode_12_fields.evidence: Lengkap Mode shows all 12 fields including Informasi Kontak and Informasi Bank sections

supplier_quick_lengkap_toggle.evidence: Toggle buttons work correctly, advanced fields show/hide appropriately

customer_quick_mode_2_fields.evidence: Quick Mode shows only name, phone fields. Advanced fields (email, segment, city, address) hidden.

customer_full_mode_all_fields.evidence: Lengkap Mode shows all fields including email, segment, city, address

quick_purchase_regression.evidence: STOK LANGSUNG badge visible, page loads correctly, API endpoint returns 422 for validation (expected)

quick_mode_hint_text.evidence: Supplier: 'Mode Cepat: 3 field sudah cukup!', Customer: 'Mode Cepat: 2 field sudah cukup!'

simpan_cepat_button.evidence: Button shows 'Simpan Cepat' in Quick Mode, 'Simpan' in Lengkap Mode

collapsible_advanced_fields.evidence: 'Tambah detail lainnya' link expands advanced fields in Quick Mode

edit_mode_default_full.evidence: When editing existing record, form automatically shows Lengkap Mode

new_entry_default_quick.evidence: When adding new record, form defaults to Quick Mode

ui_test_results.supplier_quick_mode_ui: PASS - Quick/Lengkap toggle, 3 field hint, Simpan Cepat button
ui_test_results.supplier_advanced_hidden: PASS - Informasi Kontak and Informasi Bank hidden in Quick Mode
ui_test_results.supplier_lengkap_toggle: PASS - Advanced fields visible after clicking Lengkap
ui_test_results.customer_quick_mode_ui: PASS - Quick/Lengkap toggle, 2 field hint, Simpan Cepat button
ui_test_results.customer_advanced_hidden: PASS - Email and Segmen hidden in Quick Mode
